home.title: Make custom skins for League of Legends
home.tagline: Guides, tools, and workflows from the Divine Skins creator community.
home.tracksSubheading: Three of the most-trafficked tracks in the wiki.
home.trackWalkthroughDesc: New here? Start with the end-to-end path from blank Maya scene to a ready-to-install fantome file.
home.trackMayaDesc: Mesh swaps, rigging, weight painting, and exporting the way the Divine creators actually do it.
home.trackVfxDesc: Bin editing, particle work, and getting effects to land without crashing the game client.

draft.fieldDescriptionPlaceholder: One sentence, about 160 characters. Shown in search and previews.
draft.bodyPlaceholder: Start writing. Use the toolbar above to drop in components. Type @ to link to another guide.
draft.previewUnavailable: Preview unavailable right now. Your draft is safe and you can still publish.
draft.handoffNewBody: A new tab opened GitHub's editor with your guide pre-filled. Commit it there to open the pull request.
draft.handoffFallbackBody: Your draft is long, so GitHub can't pre-fill it. Copy it, then paste it into the blank file GitHub opened.
draft.handoffEditBody: GitHub can't pre-fill edits. Copy this, then paste it over the file on GitHub.
draft.metaBody: Add your file name to the category's meta.json, or the page won't show in the sidebar.
draft.imagesBody: Upload them to public/wiki-images/ in the same pull request.
